title: justicia readii
intro: Justicia readii, also known as the 'Thai Borage' or 'Justicia', is a plant species that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of Justicia readii have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its numerous health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Justicia readii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used topically as a poultice or applied directly to the skin to treat skin conditions and wounds.
